title: Largest Anagram Group Size
description: Given a string x containing a comma-separated list of words (e.g., 'eat,tea,tan,ate,nat,bat'), return the size of the largest group of anagrams.
inputFormat: A string x containing words separated by commas
outputFormat: Integer representing the max group size
hint: If you sort the characters within a single word, all anagrams of that word will become the exact same string. Use a HashMap to map that sorted string to its frequency count.
